rationale: Wrap the obligation in `assert(P ==> Q) by { if P { ... } }` so the two ensures' triggers fire in the same hypothesis context; pin each run's `num_packets_acked == 0`, lift `Vec::len() == 0` to `Seq::len() == 0`, re-assert the two `@ =~= AckState::new()` ensures and chain them transitively into `r1@ =~= r2@`, then close with Seq extensionality (`=~=`) on `un_acked@`, the Vec-equality lift, and CAckState's `ext_equal` to discharge `det_new_equal`.
